BeaconAI Action Brief

What we evaluated this month and what we are watching.

State of store

healthy_supplements_240d. AOV (L28): $44 (-1.7% vs prior). Repeat rate (L28): 0.4% (-6.6% vs prior). Orders (L28): 972 (7.0% vs prior).

Recommended

No primary play this month. legacy actions list is empty

No targeting plays met audience-floor and overlap rules this run.

Watching

Trending signals not yet ready to recommend.

  • orders↑ upThreshold to act: +/- 10% to fire an orders-driven play
  • net sales↑ upThreshold to act: +/- 10% to revisit revenue plays
  • aov↓ downThreshold to act: +/- 5% to fire an AOV play

Considered, not recommended

These plays have a real cohort on your store but aren't ready to recommend yet. Each card shows what we'd activate once measurement is in place.

Dormant repeat-buyer winback

Why held: Audience is too small to send.

Eligible audience is below the minimum send threshold this run.

Audience: 0 people | last order 60-120d ago, >=2 prior orders, no order in last 28d

Would fire if: Would fire if the eligible audience grows above the minimum threshold.

First-to-second cohort journey nudge

Why held: Audience is too small to send.

Eligible audience is below the minimum send threshold this run.

9 peoplefirst-time buyers whose only order is 30-90 days before anchor

Audience: 9 people | first-time buyers whose only order is 30-90 days before anchor

Would fire if: Would fire if the eligible audience grows above the minimum threshold.

AOV-threshold near-cohort cross-sell

Why held: No measured signal cleared the threshold yet.

No measured signal yet for this play at this store; held as targeting until campaign outcomes calibrate the lift.

What we'd send: Send a curated cross-sell email to customers $5-$15 below a merchant AOV threshold (free shipping or spend-X-get-Y), suggesting a specific SKU that would complete the threshold; no discount code.

Audience: 0 people | customers $5-$15 below merchant AOV threshold (snapshot)

Would fire if: Would fire once the audience can be measured against a valid comparison group.

Second-purchase nudge for one-and-done buyers

Why held: Supplement reorder timing sits on the edge of our analysis window; the first-to-second purchase signal is too quiet to act on this month.

Typical supplement reorder cadence sits at the edge of the L28 primary window; the supporting signal for first-to-second nudge did not clear the directional bar on this store.

Audience: 47 people | customers with exactly one historical order

Would fire if: Would fire when first-to-second conversion data lands via campaign realization (Phase 9) so a cadence-aware measurement design can replace the L28 returning-customer-share proxy.

Lapsed-buyer reactivation (3–6 weeks since last order)

Why held: No measured signal cleared the threshold yet.

No measured signal yet for this play at this store; held as targeting until campaign outcomes calibrate the lift.

691 peoplelast purchase 35-50 days before anchor

Audience: 691 people | last purchase 35-50 days before anchor

Would fire if: Would fire once the audience can be measured against a valid comparison group.

Top-product re-targeting

Why held: No measured signal cleared the threshold yet.

No measured signal yet for this play at this store; held as targeting until campaign outcomes calibrate the lift.

396 peoplebuyers of top-revenue product

What we'd send: Email a curated bundle of the hero SKU plus complementary products to recent buyers.

Audience: 396 people | buyers of top-revenue product

Would fire if: Would fire once the audience can be measured against a valid comparison group.

Data quality

  • metric_incoherent_for_cadence
  • Primary window: L7
  • Available windows: L7, L28, L56, L90
  • Monthly revenue est.: $43,157
  • We only recommend primary plays that could realistically add at least $5,000 this month for a store your size.
